title: Magical Addons
description: Magical Addons is an ambitious data pack for Minecraft : Java Edition designed to consistently further the boundaries of magic in Minecraft. Craft magic items, fight new mobs and explore a reimagined Aether dimension!
body:
**Intro**

Magical Addons is an ambitious data pack for Minecraft : Java Edition designed to consistently further the boundaries of magic in Minecraft. Craft magic items, fight new mobs and explore a reimagined Aether dimension! 

**⚠️ Warning ⚠️**

This is a standalone data pack that is not guaranteed to work with any complementary mods or shader packs. This is an early access release - bugs, crashes, and unexpected issues may occur. 

Join our Discord Server to get support and give feedback: https://discord.gg/4kzRhxpjbk

Check out the trailer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yhODbLjt39U

Stay up to date with everything Magical Addons on X: https://x.com/MagicalAddonsMC

**Setup**

- Locate your .minecraft installation directory
- To add the data pack to an existing world : drop the "magical_addons_datapack" folder into the “datapacks” directory of your world
- To add the data pack to a new world : select the "More" tab in the new world settings, click "Data Packs", then drag the "magical_addons_datapack" into the Minecraft window
- In your “resourcepacks” directory, drop the "Magical Addons Resource Pack" folder
- In the game, select the "Magical Addons Resource Pack" from your Resource Pack list

**Credits**

- GhostAdmiral (Executive Producer & Head Of Community - Project Lead, Programming, Game Design, Testing)
- Jatzylap (Production Director & Development Lead - Project Lead, Programming, Game Design, Game Art, SFX, Testing)
- Kotew (Original Concept, Programming, Game Design, Game Art)
- NachoToast (Programming)
- Odedbir (Programming)
- Oisann (Narrative Design)
- SammygoodTunes (Original Soundtrack, Testing)
